STMSN_01000M_EXPLANATION.Text: A young man is faced with his own weaknesses and resolves to become stronger in pursuit of a "good death."

STMSN_01001M_EXPLANATION.Text: Curses gather when the seal on a Cursed Object is dismantled. In order to thwart them, Itadori does the unthinkable...

STMSN_01002M_EXPLANATION.Text: Jujutsu Sorcerer Satoru Gojo instructs Itadori to swap with Sukuna to confirm his incarnation. A fierce battle ensues.

STMSN_01003M_EXPLANATION.Text: With his grandfather's dying wish in mind, Itadori chooses between dying now, or after consuming all of Sukuna's fingers.

STMSN_01004M_EXPLANATION.Text: When asked why he came to Jujutsu High, Itadori first thinks of his grandfather, the things he alone can do, and...

STMSN_01005M_EXPLANATION.Text: Gojo has a certain goal in mind when he tests Kugisaki and Itadori on exorcising Curses...

STMSN_01006M_EXPLANATION.Text: A Cursed Spirit takes a child hostage. After weighing the life-or-death options, Kugisaki comes to a conclusion...

STMSN_01007M_EXPLANATION.Text: Itadori and the others hear a Curse Womb has been identified at the Detention Center. They go to rescue survivors, but...

STMSN_01008M_EXPLANATION.Text: Kugisaki senses a strange presence while out wandering on her own... "How can there be so many?!"

STMSN_01009M_EXPLANATION.Text: The mortally wounded Itadori receives Fushiguro's signal. He calls on Sukuna for aid, who says: "All right, let's go kill some kids."

STMSN_01010M_EXPLANATION.Text: Sukuna possesses Itadori and appears before Fushiguro: "I've thought about what I can do..."

STMSN_02011M_EXPLANATION.Text: "Guess that doesn't mean much when you die yourself." As Fushiguro and Kugisaki ponder Itadori's dying wish, a figure approaches...

STMSN_02012M_EXPLANATION.Text: Jogo asks how to defeat a Jujutsu Sorcerer. Geto replies, "You'll need to fulfill two conditions."

STMSN_02013M_EXPLANATION.Text: "We're not dead yet!" Itadori, who was taken for dead, glares at Sukuna. Sukuna states the conditions of his revival, but...

STMSN_02014M_EXPLANATION.Text: Ijichi is listening to Gojo share his dreams when he catches sight of something... "G-G-Gojo!"

STMSN_02015M_EXPLANATION.Text: Frustrated, Itadori takes lessons on Cursed Energy control from Gojo. "Make me strong. Make me the strongest."

STMSN_02016M_EXPLANATION.Text: After being flung into the air by Panda, Kugisaki ramps up her training for the Exchange Event. "I'm just getting started!"

STMSN_02017M_EXPLANATION.Text: "Why did you run? Kind of a waste of your talents." Sukuna's words lead Fushiguro to a realization about Cursed Tools.

STMSN_02018S_EXPLANATION.Text: Fights aren't always one-on-one. Keenly aware of this since the Detention Center, Kugisaki does special training with Maki and Inumaki.

STMSN_02019S_EXPLANATION.Text: Previously injured by a massive Cursed Spirit, Fushiguro undergoes special training with Panda on how to fight giant enemies.

STMSN_02020S_EXPLANATION.Text: While Fushiguro and Kugisaki are on a break, exhausted from training, Gojo approaches them with a grin...

STMSN_02021M_EXPLANATION.Text: Gojo is attacked while in transit. Who are they, and what could their motive be...?

STMSN_02022M_EXPLANATION.Text: Said to be the pinnacle of Jujutsu battles, a battle of Domain Expansions begins.

STMSN_02023M_EXPLANATION.Text: After escaping from Hanami, Jogo asks Geto for a strategy to defeat Gojo. Just then a new Cursed Spirit arrives...

STMSN_02024M_EXPLANATION.Text: Gojo teaches Itadori how to handle Curse users, who abuse Jujutsu for evil. In the process, he notices an unusual habit.

STMSN_02025M_EXPLANATION.Text: Maki, Fushiguro, and Kugisaki continue training, unaware of the visitors who've just arrived at Jujutsu High.

STMSN_02026M_EXPLANATION.Text: Todo comes to question Fushiguro and Kugisaki: "What kind of woman is your type?" Fushiguro reluctantly answers...

STMSN_02027S_EXPLANATION.Text: "At the end of the day, I can only rely on myself." Needing strength after Mai beat her, Kugisaki finds Inumaki and Panda.

STMSN_02028M_EXPLANATION.Text: Gojo meets with Gakuganji, head of the conservatives, to discuss Itadori and the future of the Jujutsu world.

STMSN_03029M_EXPLANATION.Text: Three boys' disfigured corpses are found in a movie theater. Someone who knew one of the victims encounters the Cursed Spirit behind the crime.

STMSN_03030M_EXPLANATION.Text: Itadori goes to investigate the crime scene with Nanami. They find residuals and another surprise waiting for them...

STMSN_03031M_EXPLANATION.Text: Itadori exercises a new skill he learned with Gojo. Meanwhile, Nanami has a realization...

STMSN_03032M_EXPLANATION.Text: Nanami determines Mahito's hideout location and heads there alone, but he's welcomed by more than just Mahito.

STMSN_03033M_EXPLANATION.Text: Yoshino mulls over the talk he had with Itadori. He loves his mother, but Mahito's influence is starting to take hold...

STMSN_03034M_EXPLANATION.Text: Having only dodged Mahito's onslaught of attacks so far, Nanami decides to stop holding back and deal a counterattack!

STMSN_03035M_EXPLANATION.Text: Yoshino charges into Satozakura High School to hunt down his mother's killer. Itadori goes after to remedy the situation.

STMSN_03036M_EXPLANATION.Text: Nanami comes to Itadori's aid in a tight spot. Noticing a change in Mahito's condition, the two of them launch an assault.

STMSN_03037M_EXPLANATION.Text: Itadori hears a plea from the transfigured human he's been fighting off: "Please...kill me."

STMSN_03038M_EXPLANATION.Text: Itadori comes to Nanami's aid. The two launch another onslaught to end the battle, but Mahito has a trump card.

STMSN_03039M_EXPLANATION.Text: Mahito reflects on his defeat and discusses his next strategy with Geto.

STMSN_03040S_EXPLANATION.Text: In a bad mood, Kugisaki visits Maki on her day off. It all started when she went out shopping...

STMSN_03041S_EXPLANATION.Text: "Let's take it easy at home." Gojo makes a request of Nanami, who finishes his work on time.

STMSN_03042S_EXPLANATION.Text: Fushiguro and Inumaki head out to buy new Panda merch with Panda, but things take an unexpected turn.

STMSN_03043S_EXPLANATION.Text: "Hey, what great timing!" Gojo approaches Kugisaki and Maki after Nanami turns down his request.

STMSN_04044M_EXPLANATION.Text: It's day one of the Tokyo-Kyoto Sister School Exchange Event—and time to announce Itadori's alive! How will people react...?

STMSN_04045M_EXPLANATION.Text: Itadori is stronger than ever following his supposed death. Maki is unsure how to react, but Fushiguro makes her reassess.

STMSN_04046M_EXPLANATION.Text: The Tokyo-Kyoto Sister School Exchange Event has begun, and emotions are running high. The team battles are starting...

STMSN_04047M_EXPLANATION.Text: The Exchange Event is all going to plan until a lone wolf infiltrates the grounds!

STMSN_04048M_EXPLANATION.Text: Itadori continues to grow through battling, but Todo recognizes something: "You've developed a bad habit."

STMSN_04049M_EXPLANATION.Text: As the battle results start coming in, an ominous presence draws closer to Inumaki, who is all on his own.

STMSN_04050M_EXPLANATION.Text: A Special Grade Curse born out of the fear of forests. Out of their depth, Fushiguro and the others try to flee, yet...

STMSN_04051M_EXPLANATION.Text: Fushiguro and the others persevere through Hanami's fierce attacks, but the scales are about to tip...

STMSN_04052M_EXPLANATION.Text: "Black Flash"—a dark light close to the essence of Cursed Energy itself. Itadori is on the brink of a breakthrough, when...

STMSN_04053M_EXPLANATION.Text: When Itadori manages a Black Flash, Todo joins and fights alongside him: "Now, what do you say we get cooking!"

STMSN_04054M_EXPLANATION.Text: Todo finally unleashes his Cursed Technique! What is he capable of with his (self-proclaimed) IQ of 530,000?

STMSN_04055M_EXPLANATION.Text: The Exchange Event is back on track, and the next battle is...a game of baseball? It's time for Jujutsu Koshien, play ball!

STMSN_04056S_EXPLANATION.Text: Gojo holds a joint training session for first-years and second-years as Jujutsu High gradually returns to normality...

STMSN_04057S_EXPLANATION.Text: Despite her injuries, Hanami feels the joy of battle as she grows... "You're becoming more like a Curse every day, Hanami."

STMSN_04058S_EXPLANATION.Text: The second round of joint training battles begins, and Todo from Kyoto is here. Seems Fushiguro owes him for last time...

STMSN_05059M_EXPLANATION.Text: Non-sorcerers are being killed by a Curse. As Itadori investigates, he uncovers the shocking truth behind the incidents.

STMSN_05060M_EXPLANATION.Text: Itadori and the team enter a Domain to confront a Cursed Spirit. However, they aren't the only intruders around...

STMSN_05061M_EXPLANATION.Text: Kugisaki is suddenly pulled out of the Domain. Who is this new enemy, and what do they want? Who is behind the incidents?

STMSN_05062M_EXPLANATION.Text: Fushiguro exorcises the Cursed Spirit, but the Domain doesn't close. Something has caused another entity to awaken...

STMSN_05063M_EXPLANATION.Text: Fushiguro attempts to play his trump card, but the memory of Sukuna's words stops him: "Kind of a waste of your talents."

STMSN_05064M_EXPLANATION.Text: Eso senses the presence of a finger and leaves the fight to retrieve it, but his plans change when Itadori sees him.

STMSN_05065M_EXPLANATION.Text: "A Technique that guarantees victory? You two are strong." Can Itadori and Kugisaki overturn Eso's Cursed Technique?

STMSN_05066M_EXPLANATION.Text: Grade 1 Sorcerers—the driving force of the Jujutsu world. Five students from the Tokyo school are recommended for promotion.

STMSN_05067S_EXPLANATION.Text: Kugisaki and Maki head to a shop at Gojo's recommendation, but it seems there might be something more to it...

STMSN_05068S_EXPLANATION.Text: Jogo and Hanami suspect Mahito of cheating as he keeps winning at cards. He denies it, but is he telling the truth?

STMSN_05069S_EXPLANATION.Text: "Show me how much stronger you've gotten." Inumaki and Panda put Fushiguro to the test after the Yasohachi Bridge incident.

STMSN_05070S_EXPLANATION.Text: Itadori and Gojo decide themselves to join Nanami on his mission. This time, Gojo seems to actually have a reason behind it.

STMSN_06071M_EXPLANATION.Text: Wishing for his own death while bearing a Curse, a boy joins Jujutsu High to become a Sorcerer and fight Curses head-on.

STMSN_06072M_EXPLANATION.Text: Maki asks Okkotsu why he came to Jujutsu High. He replies that he has a wish...

STMSN_06073S_EXPLANATION.Text: Inumaki pairs with Panda for training, but he seems troubled: "Toge, something worrying you about the transfer student?"

STMSN_06074M_EXPLANATION.Text: While training, Okkotsu decides to break Rika's curse. Gojo hands him something that will help: "Here, use this."

STMSN_06075M_EXPLANATION.Text: Okkotsu learns to wield a sword. Just when he thinks training with Gojo is over, a powerful opponent steps up for round two.

STMSN_06076S_EXPLANATION.Text: In celebration of Maki's recovery, Gojo holds a pairs tournament. Among the teams is an interesting duo...

STMSN_06077M_EXPLANATION.Text: Seasons have changed, and it's now summer. Through lessons and training, Okkotsu has grown closer to his classmates.

STMSN_06078M_EXPLANATION.Text: Okkotsu joins Inumaki on a mission, but he still feels a little on edge around him since they struggle to communicate.

STMSN_06079S_EXPLANATION.Text: Having grown closer through the shopping center incident, Inumaki and Okkotsu enter the pairs tournament as a team.

STMSN_06080M_EXPLANATION.Text: Curse users use their abilities with malicious intent. Geto, said to be the most evil among them, arrives at Jujutsu High to announce some "plans" of his...

STMSN_06081M_EXPLANATION.Text: Gojo reminisces on his time as a young student, the time he spent with Geto, and the day they went their separate ways...

STMSN_06082M_EXPLANATION.Text: Okkotsu reflects on Geto's words. Maki tells him of her upbringing, but they're unaware of something sinister approaching...

STMSN_06083M_EXPLANATION.Text: Finding Geto's absence from the front lines strange, Gojo sends Inumaki and Panda to Jujutsu High: "Defend them with your lives."

STMSN_06084M_EXPLANATION.Text: When Okkotsu sees his classmates grievously injured, he confronts the most evil of Curse users: "I will end you."

STMSN_06085M_EXPLANATION.Text: One fighting for their existence, the other, to win. Their final battle begins...

STMSN_06086M_EXPLANATION.Text: Okkotsu wakes to the worried faces of his peers. Rika, whom he sacrificed himself for, is there among them.

STMSN_06087S_EXPLANATION.Text: Time has passed since Okkotsu lifted Rika's Curse, and Gojo has come to evaluate his strength. He also has a favor to ask...

STMSN_06088S_EXPLANATION.Text: A fight that's happened before...? Gojo's students take him on! Push past your limits!

STMSN_06089S_EXPLANATION.Text: The highest grade of Curse, born out of fear. They act not only on instinct, but also to fulfill their goals and desires.

STMSN_08090M_EXPLANATION.Text: A young Geto and Gojo embark on their final moments of youth.

STMSN_08091M_EXPLANATION.Text: Toji Fushiguro attacks the moment they enter the barrier of Jujutsu High. What unpredictable secrets does he have up his sleeve?

STMSN_08092M_EXPLANATION.Text: Just prior to merging with Tengen, Amanai decides to follow her own feelings. Geto tried to make that wish a reality, however...

STMSN_08093M_EXPLANATION.Text: Gojo was not dead. He stands before Toji once again, possessing the secret of Cursed Energy manipulation he grasped on the verge of death.

STMSN_08094M_EXPLANATION.Text: Gojo has become the strongest, while Geto has become solitary. Their paths are soon to diverge.

STMSN_09095M_EXPLANATION.Text: Kokichi Muta, aka Mechamaru, was the insider for the Cursed Spirits. He now unleashes his all on Mahito in a bid to see his friends.

STMSN_09096M_EXPLANATION.Text:
October 31, 2018
Curse users initiate their plan in Shibuya on Halloween.

STMSN_09097M_EXPLANATION.Text: Satoru Gojo arrives in Shibuya, enemies and a trap awaiting him. The fight between Gojo and the Cursed Spirits begins.

STMSN_09098M_EXPLANATION.Text: The Prison Realm brought to seal Satoru Gojo is ready. Upon opening of the gate, a shocking encounter takes place.

STMSN_09099M_EXPLANATION.Text: Itadori learns from mini Mechamaru that Gojo has been sealed. He aims to meet up with Nanami to come up with a plan.

STMSN_09100M_EXPLANATION.Text: Itadori and crew conclude that the Veils would be in places that stand out. They head to the roof of a tall building.

STMSN_09101M_EXPLANATION.Text: Nanami sees an injured Kugisaki and Nitta. He unleashes his fury on Shigemo, and Kugisaki witnesses his overwhelming power.

STMSN_09102M_EXPLANATION.Text: Itadori reaches Shibuya's underground station to be met with a raging Choso. "Did my little brothers leave behind any last words for me?"

STMSN_09103M_EXPLANATION.Text: Naobito, Nanami, and Maki enter Dagon's Domain. Met with waves of attacks, the Sorcerers become fatigued.

STMSN_09104M_EXPLANATION.Text: Ryomen Sukuna gains control of Itadori's body and refuses Jogo's suggestion of a Binding Vow. Their fierce battle ensues.

STMSN_09105M_EXPLANATION.Text: A mysterious man targets Fushiguro. A weakened Fushiguro gives his all to combat the man with bone-crushing strength.

STMSN_09106M_EXPLANATION.Text: Fushiguro, on the verge of death fighting Shigemo, uses Ten Shadows Technique to summon a Shikigami, and starts the exorcism ritual.

STMSN_09107M_EXPLANATION.Text: Nanami roams Shibuya, fighting with his grave injuries when Mahito appears before him. Itadori arrives, and he sees...

STMSN_09108M_EXPLANATION.Text: Kugisaki returns to battle and encounters Mahito. She notices her attacks don't affect him, so she devises a strategy.

STMSN_09109M_EXPLANATION.Text: Although Kugisaki dealt grave damage to Mahito, she is defeated. Itadori almost loses hope until a young man arrives.

STMSN_09110M_EXPLANATION.Text: Itadori realizes he must carry out what was entrusted to him. Itadori, Mahito, and Todo unleash Black Flashes—the fight intensifying.

STMSN_09111M_EXPLANATION.Text: Mahito, on the verge of death, finally realizes the true essence of his soul. He transforms and stands boldly before Itadori.

STMSN_09112M_EXPLANATION.Text: Kyoto School Sorcerers head to Shibuya. On the ride there, Mechamaru says his last words to Miwa as Kokichi Muta.

STMSN_09113M_EXPLANATION.Text: Choso is enraged after realizing who set him up to kill his own brother. Taking the role of big brother, he fights him.

STMSN_09114M_EXPLANATION.Text: The man named Noritoshi Kamo tells of the world to come. Chaos is birthed anew and another battle unfolds.

STR_DEMO_LABEL_0001.Text: Based on "Jujutsu Kaisen" by Gege Akutami
